name_en: Museum of Fine Arts of Tours

phrases.intent_en: Ask what the entry fee is
phrases.cultural_note: The Musée des Beaux-Arts de Tours has a modest admission fee.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket desk.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a special exhibition on
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il une exposition temporaire en ce moment ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL oon eks-poh-zee-SYON tahm-poh-RAIR ahn suh moh-MAHN
phrases.cultural_note: The Musée des Beaux-Arts occupies the former archbishop's palace and regularly hosts temporary exhibitions alongside its permanent collection.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the museum garden is
phrases.text_local: Où est le jardin du musée ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh luh zhar-DAHN doo moo-ZAY
phrases.cultural_note: The museum gardens feature a famous Lebanese cedar.

responses.english: Through that door, at the back.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what the entry fee is
phrases.text_local: Quel est le tarif d'entrée pour le musée ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel ay luh tah-REEF dahn-TRAY poor luh moo-ZAY
phrases.cultural_note: The museum is free on the first Sunday of every month; reduced rates apply for students and EU citizens under 26.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket desk.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the 18th-century French paintings are
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve la section de peinture française du XVIIIe siècle ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lah sek-SYON duh pan-TOOR frahn-SEZ doo dees-HWEE-tyem SYEKL
phrases.cultural_note: The museum has a notable collection of 18th-century French painting and decorative arts, housed in the grand salons of the former episcopal palace.

responses.english: On the first floor, right wing.
